title: Start checkout with delivery details and place an order
description: This test verifies that a customer can complete checkout with delivery details and see a success modal with an order number.

steps.description: Add at least one product to the cart
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the customer details with a valid customer name
Fill in the delivery address with a valid address
Select delivery as the fulfillment method
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify an order number is displayed

title: Browse menu and add a product to the cart
description: This test verifies that a customer can browse the storefront menu and add a product to the cart, resulting in the item appearing in the cart.

steps.description: Browse the available categories and menu items
Add a product to the cart
Verify the selected item is shown in the cart

title: Open the operator portal login gate
description: This verifies that visiting the operator area presents the authentication gate before access to management tools.

steps.description: Verify an operator login prompt is visible

title: Sign in to the operator portal and view live orders
description: This test verifies that an operator can log in to the operator portal and reach the live orders dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the operator username with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the operator password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the operator dashboard is displayed

title: Open a highlighted active order from the pending banner
description: This test verifies that a customer can follow the pending order banner to the active order tracking view and see the current status.

steps.description: Navigate to the highlighted active order
Verify the active order tracking view is displayed
Verify the current order status is displayed

title: Keep shopping after adding multiple items
description: This test verifies that a customer can add multiple products and continue browsing while the cart contents remain retained.

steps.description: Browse the available categories and menu items
Add the first product to the cart
Add a second product to the cart
Verify both selected items are still shown in the cart

title: Update an order status from the operator portal
description: This test verifies that an operator can open a live order and change its status from the operator portal.

steps.description: Fill in the operator username with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the operator password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated order status is displayed
Verify the order appears in the completed or archived history when applicable

title: Review and update a live order as an operator
description: This verifies that an authenticated operator can open live orders, change an order status, and see the updated order reflected in the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the operator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the updated order status is visible
Verify the live orders view remains accessible

title: Place an order with pickup instead of delivery
description: This test verifies that a customer can complete checkout using pickup and receive a successful order confirmation.

steps.description: Add at least one product to the cart
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the customer details with a valid customer name
Select pickup as the fulfillment method
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify an order number is displayed

title: Adjust cart quantities and remove an item
description: This test verifies that a customer can increase or decrease item quantities and remove an item from the cart before checkout.

steps.description: Browse the available categories and menu items
Add a product to the cart
Remove the item from the cart

title: Open account settings and review order history
description: This test verifies that a customer can open the account area, view settings, and switch to order history.

steps.description: Open the account or profile panel
Switch to the order history view

title: Create, edit, and delete a menu item as an operator
description: This verifies that an authenticated operator can manage items by creating, updating, and removing a menu item successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the operator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Edit the newly created menu item
Delete the newly created menu item
Verify the menu item is no longer displayed

title: Create, edit, and delete a menu category as an operator
description: This verifies that an authenticated operator can manage categories from creation through deletion in the menu management area.

steps.description: Fill in the operator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify the category is no longer displayed

title: Create a menu item in the operator portal
description: This test verifies that an operator can create a new menu item and see it in the item list.

steps.description: Fill in the operator username with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the operator password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a new item with valid details
Verify the new item is displayed in the item list

title: Create a menu category in the operator portal
description: This test verifies that an operator can create a new menu category and see it in the category list.

steps.description: Fill in the operator username with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the operator password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Create a new category with a valid name
Verify the new category is displayed in the category list

title: Update delivery settings as an operator
description: This verifies that an authenticated operator can review delivery configuration, make a change, and save the updated settings.

steps.description: Fill in the operator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Open the settings and delivery configuration view
Update a delivery zone or service layer setting
Verify the updated settings are visible

title: Match a linked account using phone details
description: This test verifies that a returning customer can enter phone details and see matched account data in the profile area.

steps.description: Open the account or profile panel
Verify matched account data is displayed
Verify linked customer information is displayed

title: Unlock a coupon and apply it during checkout
description: This verifies that a customer can unlock an eligible coupon with a cheat code, select it in checkout, and proceed with the order using the applied discount.

steps.description: Enter a valid cheat code to unlock a coupon
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Review archived orders as an operator
description: This verifies that an authenticated operator can switch to archived orders and review completed order history.

steps.description: Fill in the operator credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}

title: Review archived completed orders in the operator portal
description: This test verifies that an operator can access the archived or completed order history after logging in.

steps.description: Fill in the operator username with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the operator password with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify completed order history is displayed

title: Show a coupon validation error for an invalid coupon
description: This verifies that checkout prevents applying an invalid or expired coupon and shows a validation error to the customer.

steps.description: Try to apply an invalid or expired coupon
Verify a coupon validation error is visible
